race.description: Es Hoepner Oam & Dorothy Hoepner Oam 2yo Hcp (C1)
race.comment: The 2YO's kick things off where ARIZONA DREAMER (9) looks the one to beat. She was only beaten a head on debut before tackling stronger company last start at Morphettville. Back to this level suits and she should get every chance from an inside draw. Looks the one to beat. VEGA NOW (12) has been very impressive at the trials coming into this and looks primed for a bold effort on debut. She's shown talent all the way through and the inside barrier should see her get every chance to score a debut victory. BLANDFORD BARON (1) is some query on the wet deck with his past two disappointing efforts being on a Soft track. He's a classy type though and he can't be discounted. MOUNTAIN DEVIL (8) can't be left out of calculations with his form tying in well here.
